title: Immortal Snail by Niruki
description: Immortal Snail adds an unstoppable snail that relentlessly tracks its chosen player across the world.
body:
Immortal Snail adds an unstoppable snail that relentlessly tracks its chosen player across the world.
It climbs walls, survives all damage, teleports closer if it falls too far behind, and kills instantly on contact.
Designed for horror challenge gameplay, this mod creates constant pressure and turns every journey into a survival race.

 

(CREATIVE)

Use the Snail Compass to locate your stalker and check its current direction and distance.
